globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://* wss://*; frame-src 'self' https://*;
